source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One side-view quad roller skate on textured drawing paper.

process_strategy: The contact sheet develops one side-view skate through boot guide, high-top boot, sole and wheels, laces, black outline, marker fills, then a final finish pass.

final_elements.name: side-view boot guide
final_elements.description: A long ankle-high boot silhouette with a toe guide.

final_elements.name: high-top boot, sole, and faint ground line
final_elements.description: A chunky boot with a raised ankle, separate sole, and a light baseline shadow.

final_elements.name: quad wheels and trucks
final_elements.description: Four small wheels joined by simple trucks below the sole.

final_elements.name: eyelets and crisscross laces
final_elements.description: A short ladder of eyelets and clear lace crossings.

final_elements.name: pink, teal, yellow, and purple marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright color on the existing boot, wheels, laces, and ground line.

frames.visible_job: Places the side-view boot guide and toe direction.
Adds the ankle rise, sole, and a faint ground line to the existing boot guide.
introduces: high-top boot, sole, and faint ground line

frames.visible_job: Adds four wheels and simple trucks beneath the sole.
requires_prior_elements: high-top boot, sole, and faint ground line

frames.visible_job: Adds eyelets and crisscross laces along the established front.
requires_prior_elements: high-top boot, sole, and faint ground line

frames.visible_job: Thickens established contours and adds saturated marker fills to the established skate and ground line.
introduces: pink, teal, yellow, and purple marker fill
requires_prior_elements: high-top boot, sole, and faint ground line

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing outlines, laces, colors, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No boot part, wheel, truck, lace, color, or highlight may first appear in the final image.
The skate must retain one side-view pose and wheel spacing across all frames.
No late frame may turn the handmade marker skate into a glossy icon or add a face, border, or unrelated prop.
